positive: A stylized, vintage-inspired illustration of a mystical forest scene. The central focus is a graceful, bioluminescent deer standing in a clearing. Giant, stylized ferns and exotic flowers frame the deer. The overall mood is whimsical and ethereal, featuring deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and pops of glowing gold. Use clean linework, high contrast, and a limited, rich color palette. The style should mimic mid-century modern botanical etchings combined with magical realism, suitable for screen printing on apparel. The composition must feature a strong, central silhouette of the main subject against a detailed, moody background, ensuring visibility when printed. Clean lines, vector illustration quality, high detail.
negative: blur, noisy, amateur, cropped, watermark, text, logo, signature, lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifact, messy, dirty, grain, bokeh
